src: Note: Mostly non-functional, see README --- A YouTube Music client with a focus on customisation of colours and song metadata. Built with Compose Multiplatform for Android and desktop.
ja: 注意：ほぼ非機能。READMEを参照 --- 色とメタデータのカスタマイズに重点を置いたYouTube Musicクライアント。Compose MultiplatformでAndroidとデスクトップ向けに構築
